title: cr_add_partner - arguments
description: Add a carrier or broker to your partners watchlist. Cipher & Row monitors authority, insurance, bond, safety rating, address, and phone for material changes and notifies you via your chosen channels. Idempotent: re-adding the same partner updates the existing watch. Provide dot_number when partner_kind=carrier, mc_number when partner_kind=broker.

x-mcp.roleNote: Carrier-role accounts may only add partner_kind=broker (their counterparties).

partner_kind.description: Carrier accounts may only add partner_kind=broker.

mc_number.description: US broker MC number (brokers need this or cab_id).

cab_id.description: Canadian broker CAB number, format CAB-XX-NNNNNNN (brokers need this or mc_number).

legal_name.description: Partner legal name (optional; backfilled from FMCSA or the Canadian registry if omitted).

change_types.description: Which changes to be notified about. Default: the six standard types; chameleon_flagged (reincarnated-carrier alerts) is opt-in.
